title: psychotria everardii subsp. tatei
intro: Psychotria everardii subsp. tatei, also known as the Tatei leaf, is a medicinal plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to the Pacific Island region. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimalarial, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psychotria everardii subsp. tatei include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing its medicinal properties to be utilized for therapeutic purposes.
